case_title: DAVID PATCHEN HANDBLOWN GLASS VS. JULIA RILEY O'SULLIVAN

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVID PATCHEN HANDBLOWN GLASS AS TO DEFENDANT O'SULLIVAN, JULIA RILEY
FILED CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT O'SULLIVAN, JULIA RILEY AS TO PLAINTIFF DAVID PATCHEN HANDBLOWN GLASS
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DAVID PATCHEN HANDBLOWN GLASS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT IS OUT OF STATE IN RHODE ISLAND. PER C.C.P. 116.340(E) "SERVICE SHALL BE MADE WITHIN THIS STATE, EXCEPT AS PROVIDED IN SUBDIVISIONS (F) AND (G)". SUBDIVISIONS (F) AND (G) DO NOT APPLY TO THIS ACTION AS THIS CLAIM RESULTS FROM A BREACH OF CONTRACT. MATTER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO FURTHER ACTION IS TAKEN BY THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 01/10/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/1/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 5/23/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
